notes: M=300 padded to Mp=512 (next allowed value >= 300 in ALLOWED_M).
N=500 padded to Np=512 (next allowed value >= 500 in ALLOWED_N).
K=700 padded to Kp=768 (next allowed value >= 700 in ALLOWED_K).
Tile (64,64,64) is the best working tile for (512,512,768) bf16 from profile (351.881 us). Tile (64,128,64) fails for bf16 at this shape per profile Failing list.
Total padded elements across A+B+C: 393216 + 393216 + 262144 = 1048576 > 500000 threshold -> numpy_pad selected over manual_copy.
Padding overhead estimated at ~70 us for numpy_pad on bf16 at this scale.
No exact profile entry for (300,500,700); using (512,512,768) as the minimum feasible padded shape.
Padding fractions: M 300->512 (70.7% utilization), N 500->512 (97.7%), K 700->768 (91.1%). N and K are efficient; M has notable waste (41.2% extra rows).
Alternative considered: Mp=256 is too small (256 < 300), so 512 is truly the minimum. No smaller option exists for M.
Strategy source: direct profile lookup (hashmap_27 equivalent) on key '512_512_768' with dtype 'bf16'.
